economic_notes: Commercial fisheries operations through Fisherman's Pride Inc. and Minigoo Fisheries Inc. Lennox Island Development Corporation also consolidated. Minigoo Fisheries Inc. reported as GBE with negative equity of $1,799,744.
notes: Fiscal year end is March 31, 2022 (not 2024). Province is Prince Edward Island (PE). Two fully consolidated subsidiaries: Fisherman's Pride Inc. and Lennox Island Development Corporation. One GBE on modified equity basis: Minigoo Fisheries Inc. (negative equity of $1,799,744). Total government transfers calculated as ISC $8,560,984 + Health Canada $3,987,867 + DFO $1,180,371 + CMHC $103,597 + Economic Development government grants $3,442,339 = $17,275,158. OSR includes commercial fisheries revenue and other non-government income. Infrastructure expenses include Capital $546,377 and Capital facilities O&M $1,289,881. Remuneration schedule referenced but values not extracted from text provided. Deferred revenue decreased significantly from $4,527,828 to $2,787,542.
